content:
MAKING MONEY WITH AI…?

4 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

AI-generated imageThere’s a lot of hype around AI right now, and naturally, many people are wondering whether it can help them make money online.
The short answer is: both yes and no.
… it’s not in the way most people hope.
Here’s how I see it.
Based on the phrasing here, I’m going to say no.
For example, I work a remote job or create content, and I use AI to generate ideas and complete tasks more efficiently. If that is what you mean by “making money with AI,” then yes.
But I suspect you weren’t referring to something as boring as what I do.
Usually people mean that they want to make huge, huge amounts of money in the new hype technology while doing minimal work.
So far as I know, this is not possible!
Here are some ways you can potentially make side income with AI: 👇

• Many companies pay people to help train AI models. If you are a subject matter expert in something, you may be able to earn around $20–$40 an hour by evaluating AI responses, checking…
